headline: Forget QQQ as the Same Company Sells the Same Nasdaq-100 for 17% Less
summary: Invesco QQQ Trust (NASDAQ:QQQ) is the most familiar way to own the Nasdaq-100, though it is not the cheapest wrapper Invesco offers for the same index. QQQ is the second-most-traded ETF in the United States, holding roughly $470 billion in assets and providing investors with one-ticker exposure to the 100 largest non-financial companies on Nasdaq, ... Forget QQQ as the Same Company Sells the Same Nasdaq-100 for 17% Less
